name: Salon desk
visualDescription: Neat nail station with tools, lamp, and products visible
lightingNote: Warm ring light or natural window light from the left
referenceAssetHint: Photograph your station before filming - use it as a reference image in Flow

name: In car
visualDescription: Natural phone-style video filmed from the parked car seat
lightingNote: Soft daylight through the windscreen, no harsh shadows
referenceAssetHint: Take a quick reference photo of the car angle and lighting

name: Packing orders
visualDescription: Hands packing Crystal Clawz products with labels and tissue paper visible
lightingNote: Bright overhead light with clean product visibility
referenceAssetHint: Use a reference photo of the packing station before parcels are sealed

name: Training room
visualDescription: Training table with practice hand, tools, notebook, and product setup
lightingNote: Even room light with a clear view of hands and tools
referenceAssetHint: Use a wide reference photo of the training setup and product area

name: Home nail setup
visualDescription: Small but neat home station with practical nail tools
lightingNote: Natural light near a window or simple desk lamp
referenceAssetHint: Use a photo that shows the home desk, lamp, and product clearly
